label: Literature Review
description: Search and screen publications for herbs, ingredients, and target proteins; returns abstracts with matched compounds and targets.

defaultOutputs.name: Source ID
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Stable identifier from the selected source (e.g. PMID, PMC ID, DOI, or PubChem reference id).

defaultOutputs.name: Abstract
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Publication abstract text when available; otherwise title or summary snippet.

defaultOutputs.name: Included plant / compound
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Herb or ingredient name from your CSV that was matched in this record (one row per hit if multiple match).

defaultOutputs.name: Included target
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Target protein (or gene) name from your CSV that was matched in this record.

configSchema.label: Herb & ingredient list (CSV)
configSchema.tooltip: Upload a CSV listing herb and ingredient names (e.g. one column `name` or a single column of terms).

configSchema.label: Target protein list (CSV)
configSchema.tooltip: Upload a CSV listing target proteins or genes to match in literature (e.g. column `target` or gene symbols).

configSchema.label: Sources to query
configSchema.tooltip: Select one or more literature or bibliographic sources to crawl for matching abstracts and citations.
